name: pathwrite
description: Headless path engine with Angular, React, and Vue adapters

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/react-adapter && npm run build -w packages/vue-adapter && npm run build -w packages/store-http && npm run build -w packages/svelte-adapter && npm run build -w packages/angular-adapter
scripts.clean: npm run clean -ws --if-present && rm -rf packages/*/dist packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo
scripts.prepublish:check: npm run clean && npm run build && npm test
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublish:check && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/core && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/angular-adapter && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/react-adapter && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/vue-adapter
